policy: Only recordings with an explicit reusable licence are served locally. A null audio src is either original browser synthesis or a reference-only item that must not be downloaded or re-hosted. No YouTube extraction or unlicensed substitution is permitted.
rightsSeparation: MIT applies to source code only. Each media/content item retains the terms recorded in CREDITS.md and public/media/audio-manifest.json; community cultural rights are not relicensed by the code licence.

runtimeAudio.implementation: Synthesized in-browser by MIT-licensed generator code with no external samples.
runtimeAudio.culturalBoundary: Modern neutral sound design only; not heritage music, ritual sound, a community field recording, or a claim about craft technique.

servedAssets.visualScope: Fictional pixel train interior, ticket conductor, abstract landscape and five-stop route; no ritual reconstruction or specific heritage performance
servedAssets.rightsNote: Project-generated content asset; not covered by the code-only MIT licence and not an artisan endorsement.

servedAssets.scope: Local recording, six synthesized ambient presets, two interpretive foley presets, and reference-only pending-rights items

servedAssets.creator: Sound Futures
servedAssets.transformation: 22-second excerpt beginning approximately 8 seconds into the source; audio transcoded to Opus in an Ogg container
servedAssets.culturalReview: Source and reuse licence verified; project-level community review still required before on-site release.
